title: microcode_ctl bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 10.
description:
[4:20250211-1.20250812-1.0.1]
- enable use with UEK8 kernels
- don't bother calling dracut if virtualized
- ensure UEK also rebuilds initramfs
- enable early update for 06-4f-01
- enable early and late load on RHCK
full_text:
[4:20250211-1.20250812-1.0.1]
- enable use with UEK8 kernels
- don't bother calling dracut if virtualized
- ensure UEK also rebuilds initramfs
- enable early update for 06-4f-01
- enable early and late load on RHCK

References:
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-19546.html
